title: Pressure pulse concentrator
abstract: The invention relates to an applicator comprising a pressure pulse concentrator, which is adapted to concentrate a planar pressure pulse, and a conduction device, which is adapted to conduct the concentrated planar pressure pulse to a delivery location. In the improved applicator, the conduction device comprises a conduction tube (10) and at least one reflector (14) provided within the conduction tube (10) adapted to reflect planar pressure pulses into at least one sideward direction.
claims:
Claims Claims 1. An applicator comprising an pressure pulse concentrator, in particular a pressure pulse concentrator according to any one of claims 10 to 14, which pressure pulse concentrator is adapted to concentrate a planar pressure pulse, and an conduction device, in particular a conduction device according to any one of claims 15 to 19, which conduction device is adapted to conduct the concentrated planar pressure pulse to a delivery location, characterized in that the conduction device comprises a conduction tube (10) and at least one reflector (14) provided within the conduction tube (10) adapted to reflect planar pressure pulses into at least one sideward direction. 2. The applicator of claim 1 , characterized in that the conduction device has a configuration, that it emits the concentrated planar pressure pulse trough an opening (19, 20) in the sidewalk 3. The applicator of claim 2, characterized in that the opening (19, 20) is closed by a window, which allows the concentrated planar pressure pulse to be emitted in a planar manner to the exterior of the applicator. 4. The applicator of any of claims 1 to 3, characterized in that the pressure pulse concentrator and the conduction device are a unitary piece, wherein an elongated portion of the conduction device, which is provided distal from the pressure pulse concentrator, is adapted to be inserted in a patients cavity. 5. The applicator of any of claims 1 to 3, characterized in that the conduction device is a separate piece, separate from the pressure pulse concentrator and adapted to be connected to an outlet of a concentration chamber (5) of the pressure pulse concentrator, wherein the concentration chamber (5) contains a conduction medium configured to conduct a planar pressure pulse from an inlet to an outlet of the concentration chamber (5) and to increase the pressure amplitude of the pressure pulse, and the conduction device has an elongated portion, which is provided distal from the pressure pulse concentrator and adapted to be inserted in a patients cavity. 6. The applicator of any of claims 1 to 4, characterized in that the applicator is adapted that the conduction medium is received in an unitary chamber constituted by the 

 concentration chamber of the pressure pulse concentrator and an conduction tube of the conduction device. 7. The applicator of any of claims 1 to 6, characterized in that a reflector piece, which is constituted by an insert, is placed in the conduction tube, wherein the reflector piece preferably has the configuration of an inverted cone. 8. The applicator of any of claims 1 to 7, characterized in that the applicator further comprises a pressure pulse generating means, which is provided at a rear side of the pressure pulse concentrator, which generates planar pressure pulses, which traverse first through a cylindrical part upstream of the concentration chamber, wherein the planar pressure pulse is concentrated and remains basically planar while its amplitude being enhanced in the concentration chamber. 9. The applicator of any of claims 1 to 8, characterized in that the relation between the longitudinal extension of the concentration chamber to the conduction tube is between 1 :1 and 1 :5. 10. A pressure pulse concentrator, comprising a planar pulse generator (2), configured to create a planar pressure pulse having a direction of propagation (3) a concentration chamber (5), containing a conduction medium, configured to conduct a planar pressure pulse from an inlet (6) to an outlet (7) of the concentration chamber (5) and increase the pressure amplitude of the pressure pulse, characterized in that the concentration chamber (5) comprises at least one tapered wall section (22) that is inclined relative to the direction of propagation of the pressure pulse created by the planar pulse generator. 1 1 . The pressure pulse concentrator of claim 10, characterized in that a tapered wall section (22) of the concentration chamber (5) is shaped as a blunt cone. 12. The pressure pulse concentrator of one of claim 10 and 1 1 , characterized in that a cross section of the outlet of the concentration chamber (5) is 20 to 50 % of the cross section of the inlet. 13. The pressure pulse concentrator of one of claims 10 to 12, characterized in that an inclination angle (a) between the tapered wall section and the direction of propagation is more than 20 degrees and not more than 40 degrees. 14. The pressure pulse concentrator of one of claims 10 to 13, characterized in that an inclination angle (a)between the direction of propagation (3) of the pressure pulse and the tapered wall section (22) varies, wherein in particular, the shape of the tapered wall section (22) follows an essentially parabolic curve. 15. A conduction device for conducting a planar pressure pulse, comprising a means for creating concentrated planar pressure pulses (1 ), in particular pursuant to one of claims 10 to 14, characterized by a conduction tube (10) with an orifice connected to an outlet (7) of the means for creating concentrated pressure pulses (1 ), that contains a conduction medium. 16. The conduction device pursuant to claim 15, characterized by at least one reflector (15) provided within the conduction tube adapted to reflect planar pressure pulses into at least one sideward direction. 17. The conduction device of one of claims 15 and 16, characterized in that the orientation and/or position of the reflector (15) is changeable. 18. The conduction device of one of claims 15 to 17, characterized in that the reflector (15) comprises at least two reflection surfaces provided in an angle relative to each other configured to split the pressure pulse and reflect it in at least two different directions (17, 18). 19. The conduction device of one of claims 15 to 18, characterized in that a cross section of the conduction tube (10) is substantially constant in a direction of propagation of the pressure pulse within the conduction device. 20. The pressure pulse concentrator according to any one of claims 10 to 14, characterized in that the pressure pulse concentrator is configured that initial pulse width of the pressure pulse is more than 1 s and less than 100 Î¼Î², in particular at least 5 Î¼Î² and less than 100 Î¼Î². 21 . The pressure pulse concentrator according to any one of claims 10 to 14 and/or claim 20, characterized in that the pressure pulse concentrator is configured in that the cross section of the pressure pulse is reduced by 50 to 80 % between an inlet (6) and an outlet (7) of the amplification means. 22. The pressure pulse concentrator according to any one of claims 10 to 14 and/or according to any one of claims 20 and 21 , characterized in that the inclination angle (a) between the tapered wall section (22) and the direction of propagation (3) of the 

 planar pressure pulse is variable, wherein, in particular, the inclination angle increases following an essentially parabolic curve. 23. The conduction device according to any one of claims 15 to 19, characterized in that the conduction device is configured that a direction of propagation (3) of the concentrated planar pressure pulse is altered within the conduction tube (10). 24. The conduction device according to any one of claims 15 to 19 and/or claim 23, characterized in that the conduction device is configured that the concentrated planar pressure pulse is reflected within the conduction tube (10). 25. The conduction device according to any one of claims 15 to 19 and/or claims 23 and 24, characterized in that the conduction device is configured that the concentrated pressure pulse is split and conducted in at least two different directions within the conduction tube (10).
